summary: Video. Handheld single-scene footage of ICE ERO officers and U.S. Marshals walking a handcuffed man (identified as a Mexican femicide fugitive) through a border-crossing port for handover to Mexican authorities, ending on a frame with the cuffed man between two agents in 'ERO' and 'U.S. MARSHAL' vests. There is no music track, no cutting between shots, and no color grade.
